title: Aedans Unicorns
description: Adds a shiny new unicorn horn to your world to save your horses from an untimely demise.
body:
Aedans Unicorns is a Fabric 1.21.1 mod that gives horses a dedicated Unicorn Horn slot, renders the horn on their head, and adds the Potion of Unicorn Vitality line. 

A slotted horn works like a totem for horses (except void): it saves them, clears effects, and grants Regeneration, Absorption, and Fire Resistance. 

Unicorn Horns drop rarely from bastions, nether fortresses, smith/village chests, desert pyramids, dungeons, end/ancient cities, and woodland mansions. 

Requires Fabric Loader/API and Java 21. MIT licensed.
